name: search-input
title: Search Input
description: Search field with clear control and icon placement.

api.description: Search field with clear control, sizes, and start or end icon placement. SearchBar is an alias.

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Side for the leading search icon.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Override or hide the default search icon.

props.name: trailing
props.description: Custom trailing slot beside clear when present.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show a clear control when the field has a value.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Called when the clear control is activated.

props.name: inputClassName
props.description: Classes on the inner input element.

props.name: className
props.description: Classes on the outer search shell.

props.name: …input attributes
props.description: value, placeholder, onChange, disabled, aria-label, etc.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --spacing-unit
props.description: Base unit for padding and gap.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.
